messages.content:
I need a comprehensive to-do list based on my conversation transcripts. Please analyze the transcript and identify all tasks, commitments, and follow-up actions I mentioned or agreed to.
Importantly: Only use items that I specifically said I would do. Do not include things other people said they would do.
For each item, include enough detail that I can understand what needs to be done without having to review the entire transcript again. Use action verbs at the beginning of each task.
Group related tasks together when possible, and highlight any dependencies between tasks (e.g., "Complete X before starting Y").
Exclude routine activities or general comments that don't require specific action.

---

## Rami Khouri – Comprehensive To-Do List (Explicit Self-Commitments Only)

---

### 1. Operations & Management

- **Coordinate with the clinic to scale up for increased patient intake:**  
  - “רמי צריך להיערך עם הקליניקה ולהגדיל אותה בהתאם. הוא הוא צריך שהתוכנית שלו תהיה מותאמת.”  
  - Ensure your operational plan aligns with the target of reaching 660 new intakes by December/January.
  - Monitor waiting times and adjust staffing/resources as needed.

- **Prepare and send job description for new sales representative:**  
  - “אני אשלח להם.” (in context of publishing the job description for the sales role)
  - Ensure that both Hebrew and English versions are ready and sent to Lee and Hedy for publication.

- **Send updates regarding Ministry of Defense agreement:**  
  - “אני מבקש ממך לעשות כזה דבר... אני אשלח להם.”
  - Draft and send a message to Yaron (and possibly Liat) confirming understanding of current status, asking if the agreement is still relevant, and requesting an update—without appearing to chase them.

---

### 2. England Operations & Product Development

- **Schedule a session to review the England demo with Shachar:**  
  - “אני חייב לשבת איתך... אני רוצה לעבור איתך על הדמו... תמצא לי זמן מחר או יום שלישי לא, יום כן, מחר יום שלישי שאני ואתה יכולים לשבת על הדמו ולעבור עליו.”
  - Propose times for this review before your upcoming travel.

- **Send availability for England demo review meeting:**  
  - “תשלח לי זמנים?”
  - Follow up with Shachar/Adiel with your available slots.

---

### 3. Financial/Admin

- **Check with Shir if she can prepare August reports earlier than usual:**  
    - “אני אבדוק עם שיר, אם היא יכולה.”
    - If possible, have Shir start preparing monthly reports on the first day of the month so that invoices can be sent out to psychiatrists by Thursday.

---

### 4. Research & Data Analysis

- **Organize urgent research/data analysis meeting:**  
    - “כן, ואני רוצה להביא את נועם.” / “נעשה פגישה גם עם אה אלינור ואחמד ואוריאל.”
    - Schedule a meeting including Noam, Elinor, Ahmad, and Uriel to plan next steps on data analysis.
    - Define goals: build a detailed task force plan specifying which data will be analyzed and how brainstorming will be structured.

---

### 5. Internal Communication & Automation

- **Build Q&A automation workflow for social media content:**
    - “נעשה את זה ככה. עמודה של שאלה, עמודה של תשובה אוטומטית ותשובה אה מאושרת... ואני אבנה אוטומציה שתקבלי הודעה כלשהי.”
    - Create a Google Sheet or similar tool where questions are entered; AI generates draft answers; you receive notification to approve/edit before posting.
    - Coordinate with Adi Lavi on question collection (“ותעשי לי שיר לשיט ואני אבנה את האוטומציה”).

---

### 6. Event Planning & Outreach

- **Decide what actions/events need to happen before your travel and after you return (pre-holidays):**  
   – “צריך להחליט מה אנחנו עושים לפני שאני טס ואחרי שאני חוזר לפני החגים.”

---

### Dependencies & Sequencing

1. Confirm England demo review time before traveling.
2. Prepare August financial report promptly so invoices can go out by Thursday.
3. Build Q&A automation after collecting initial questions from Adi Lavi.
4. Schedule research/data analysis meeting as soon as possible due to urgency expressed.
5. Operational scaling in clinic is ongoing but must align with marketing/sales targets—review regularly as numbers increase.

---

Let me know if you want any item prioritized or need draft communications/templates! 🚀
